--- title: "Hands-on_Ex0505" author: "JUNCHEN LI" date: "May 14,2026" date-modified: "last-modified" format: html editor: visual execute: eval: true echo: true warning: false freeze: auto --- ## 16.2 Installing and Launching R Packages ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} pacman::p_load(treemap, treemapify, tidyverse) ``` ::: ## 16.3.1 Importing the data set ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} realis2018 <- read_csv("data/realis2018.csv") ``` ::: ## 16.3.3 Grouped summaries without the Pipe ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} realis2018_grouped <- group_by(realis2018, `Project Name`, `Planning Region`, `Planning Area`, `Property Type`, `Type of Sale`) realis2018_summarised <- summarise(realis2018_grouped, `Total Unit Sold` = sum(`No. of Units`, na.rm = TRUE), `Total Area` = sum(`Area (sqm)`, na.rm = TRUE), `Median Unit Price ($ psm)` = median(`Unit Price ($ psm)`, na.rm = TRUE), `Median Transacted Price` = median(`Transacted Price ($)`, na.rm = TRUE)) ``` ::: ## 16.3.4 Grouped summaries with the pipe ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} realis2018_summarised <- realis2018 %>% group_by(`Project Name`,`Planning Region`, `Planning Area`, `Property Type`, `Type of Sale`) %>% summarise(`Total Unit Sold` = sum(`No. of Units`, na.rm = TRUE), `Total Area` = sum(`Area (sqm)`, na.rm = TRUE), `Median Unit Price ($ psm)` = median(`Unit Price ($ psm)`, na.rm = TRUE), `Median Transacted Price` = median(`Transacted Price ($)`, na.rm = TRUE)) ``` ::: ## 16.4.1 Designing a static treemap ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} realis2018_selected <- realis2018_summarised %>% filter(`Property Type` == "Condominium", `Type of Sale` == "Resale") ``` ::: ## 16.4.2 Using the basic arguments ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} treemap(realis2018_selected, index=c("Planning Region", "Planning Area", "Project Name"), vSize="Total Unit Sold", vColor="Median Unit Price ($ psm)", title="Resale Condominium by Planning Region and Area, 2017", title.legend = "Median Unit Price (S$ per sq. m)" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-6-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 16.4.3 Working with vColor and type arguments ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} treemap(realis2018_selected, index=c("Planning Region", "Planning Area", "Project Name"), vSize="Total Unit Sold", vColor="Median Unit Price ($ psm)", type = "value", title="Resale Condominium by Planning Region and Area, 2017", title.legend = "Median Unit Price (S$ per sq. m)" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-7-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 16.4.5 The “value” type treemap ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} treemap(realis2018_selected, index=c("Planning Region", "Planning Area", "Project Name"), vSize="Total Unit Sold", vColor="Median Unit Price ($ psm)", type="value", palette="RdYlBu", title="Resale Condominium by Planning Region and Area, 2017", title.legend = "Median Unit Price (S$ per sq. m)" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-8-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 16.4.6 The “manual” type treemap ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} treemap(realis2018_selected, index=c("Planning Region", "Planning Area", "Project Name"), vSize="Total Unit Sold", vColor="Median Unit Price ($ psm)", type="manual", palette="RdYlBu", title="Resale Condominium by Planning Region and Area, 2017", title.legend = "Median Unit Price (S$ per sq. m)" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-9-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## Ex single colour palette(Blue) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} treemap(realis2018_selected, index=c("Planning Region", "Planning Area", "Project Name"), vSize="Total Unit Sold", vColor="Median Unit Price ($ psm)", type="manual", palette="Blues", title="Resale Condominium by Planning Region and Area, 2017", title.legend = "Median Unit Price (S$ per sq. m)" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-10-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 16.4.8 Working with algorithm argument ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} treemap(realis2018_selected, index=c("Planning Region", "Planning Area", "Project Name"), vSize="Total Unit Sold", vColor="Median Unit Price ($ psm)", type="manual", palette="Blues", algorithm = "squarified", title="Resale Condominium by Planning Region and Area, 2017", title.legend = "Median Unit Price (S$ per sq. m)" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-11-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 16.4.9 Using sortID ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} treemap(realis2018_selected, index=c("Planning Region", "Planning Area", "Project Name"), vSize="Total Unit Sold", vColor="Median Unit Price ($ psm)", type="manual", palette="Blues", algorithm = "pivotSize", sortID = "Median Transacted Price", title="Resale Condominium by Planning Region and Area, 2017", title.legend = "Median Unit Price (S$ per sq. m)" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-12-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 16.5.1 Designing a basic treemap ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ggplot(data=realis2018_selected, aes(area = `Total Unit Sold`, fill = `Median Unit Price ($ psm)`), layout = "scol", start = "bottomleft") + geom_treemap() + scale_fill_gradient(low = "light blue", high = "blue") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 16.5.2 Defining hierarchy ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ggplot(data=realis2018_selected, aes(area = `Total Unit Sold`, fill = `Median Unit Price ($ psm)`, subgroup = `Planning Region`), start = "topleft") + geom_treemap() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-14-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## Group by Planning Area ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ggplot(data=realis2018_selected, aes(area = `Total Unit Sold`, fill = `Median Unit Price ($ psm)`, subgroup = `Planning Region`, subgroup2 = `Planning Area`)) + geom_treemap() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-15-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## Adding boundary line ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ggplot(data=realis2018_selected, aes(area = `Total Unit Sold`, fill = `Median Unit Price ($ psm)`, subgroup = `Planning Region`, subgroup2 = `Planning Area`)) + geom_treemap() + geom_treemap_subgroup2_border(colour = "gray40", size = 2) + geom_treemap_subgroup_border(colour = "gray20") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-16-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 16.6.1 Installing d3treeR package ```{r，eval=FALSE} install.packages("devtools") ``` ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(devtools) install_github("timelyportfolio/d3treeR") ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(d3treeR) ``` ::: ## 16.6.2 Designing An Interactive Treemap ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} tm <- treemap(realis2018_summarised, index=c("Planning Region", "Planning Area"), vSize="Total Unit Sold", vColor="Median Unit Price ($ psm)", type="value", title="Private Residential Property Sold, 2017", title.legend = "Median Unit Price (S$ per sq. m)" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-19-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: # Self Trying ## 16.3.3 Self Trying: Grouped summaries without the pipe ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} realis2018_grouped <- group_by( realis2018, `Planning Region`, `Property Type` ) realis2018_summarised <- summarise( realis2018_grouped, `Number of Transactions` = n(), `Total Units Sold` = sum(`No. of Units`, na.rm = TRUE), `Total Area (sqm)` = sum(`Area (sqm)`, na.rm = TRUE), `Average Unit Price ($ psm)` = mean(`Unit Price ($ psm)`, na.rm = TRUE), `Median Unit Price ($ psm)` = median(`Unit Price ($ psm)`, na.rm = TRUE), `Average Transacted Price ($)` = mean(`Transacted Price ($)`, na.rm = TRUE), `Median Transacted Price ($)` = median(`Transacted Price ($)`, na.rm = TRUE) ) ``` ::: ## 16.3.4 Self Trying: Select resale apartment records ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} realis2018_summarised <- realis2018 %>% group_by(`Planning Region`, `Planning Area`, `Property Type`, `Type of Sale`) %>% summarise( `Number of Transactions` = n(), `Total Units Sold` = sum(`No. of Units`, na.rm = TRUE), `Total Area (sqm)` = sum(`Area (sqm)`, na.rm = TRUE), `Average Unit Price ($ psm)` = mean(`Unit Price ($ psm)`, na.rm = TRUE), `Median Unit Price ($ psm)` = median(`Unit Price ($ psm)`, na.rm = TRUE), `Average Transacted Price ($)` = mean(`Transacted Price ($)`, na.rm = TRUE), `Median Transacted Price ($)` = median(`Transacted Price ($)`, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop" ) %>% arrange(desc(`Total Units Sold`)) ``` ::: ## 16.4.1 Self Trying: Select resale apartment records ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} realis2018_selected <- realis2018_summarised %>% filter(`Property Type` == "Apartment", `Type of Sale` == "Resale") ``` ::: ## 16.4.2 Self Trying: Using the basic arguments ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} treemap( realis2018_selected, index = c("Planning Region", "Planning Area"), vSize = "Total Units Sold", vColor = "Median Unit Price ($ psm)", title = "Resale Apartment by Planning Region and Area, 2018", title.legend = "Median Unit Price (S$ per sq. m)" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-23-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 16.4.3 Self Trying: Working with vColor and type arguments ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} treemap( realis2018_selected, index = c("Planning Region", "Planning Area"), vSize = "Total Units Sold", vColor = "Median Unit Price ($ psm)", type = "value", title = "Resale Apartment by Planning Region and Area, 2018", title.legend = "Median Unit Price (S$ per sq. m)" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-24-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 16.4.5 Self Trying: The "value" type treemap ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} treemap( realis2018_selected, index = c("Planning Region", "Planning Area"), vSize = "Total Units Sold", vColor = "Median Unit Price ($ psm)", type = "value", palette = "YlGnBu", title = "Resale Apartment by Planning Region and Area, 2018", title.legend = "Median Unit Price (S$ per sq. m)" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-25-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 16.4.6 Self Trying: The "manual" type treemap ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} treemap( realis2018_selected, index = c("Planning Region", "Planning Area"), vSize = "Total Units Sold", vColor = "Average Transacted Price ($)", type = "manual", palette = "YlGnBu", title = "Resale Apartment by Planning Region and Area, 2018", title.legend = "Average Transacted Price (S$)" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-26-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## Self Trying: The "manual" type treemap with Blues palette ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} treemap( realis2018_selected, index = c("Planning Region", "Planning Area"), vSize = "Total Units Sold", vColor = "Average Transacted Price ($)", type = "manual", palette = "Blues", title = "Resale Apartment by Planning Region and Area, 2018", title.legend = "Average Transacted Price (S$)" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-27-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 16.4.8 Self Trying: Working with algorithm argument ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} treemap( realis2018_selected, index = c("Planning Region", "Planning Area"), vSize = "Total Units Sold", vColor = "Average Transacted Price ($)", type = "manual", palette = "Blues", algorithm = "squarified", title = "Resale Apartment by Planning Region and Area, 2018", title.legend = "Average Transacted Price (S$)" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-28-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 16.4.9 Self Trying: Using sortID ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} treemap( realis2018_selected, index = c("Planning Region", "Planning Area"), vSize = "Total Units Sold", vColor = "Average Transacted Price ($)", type = "manual", palette = "Blues", algorithm = "pivotSize", sortID = "Median Transacted Price ($)", title = "Resale Apartment by Planning Region and Area, 2018", title.legend = "Average Transacted Price (S$)" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-29-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 16.5.1 Self Trying: Designing a basic treemap ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ggplot( data = realis2018_selected, aes( area = `Total Units Sold`, fill = `Average Transacted Price ($)` ) ) + geom_treemap( layout = "scol", start = "bottomleft" ) + scale_fill_gradient( low = "light blue", high = "blue" ) + labs( title = "Basic Treemap of Resale Apartment Transactions in 2018", fill = "Average Transacted Price" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-30-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 16.5.2 Self Trying: Defining hierarchy ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ggplot( data = realis2018_selected, aes( area = `Total Units Sold`, fill = `Average Transacted Price ($)`, subgroup = `Planning Region` ) ) + geom_treemap( layout = "scol", start = "topleft" ) + geom_treemap_subgroup_border( colour = "white", size = 2 ) + scale_fill_gradient( low = "light blue", high = "blue" ) + labs( title = "Treemap of Resale Apartment Transactions by Planning Region", fill = "Average Transacted Price" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-31-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## Self Trying: Group by Planning Area ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ggplot( data = realis2018_selected, aes( area = `Total Units Sold`, fill = `Average Transacted Price ($)`, subgroup = `Planning Region`, subgroup2 = `Planning Area` ) ) + geom_treemap( layout = "scol", start = "topleft" ) + geom_treemap_subgroup_border( colour = "white", size = 2 ) + geom_treemap_subgroup2_border( colour = "grey70", size = 0.8 ) + scale_fill_gradient( low = "light blue", high = "blue" ) + labs( title = "Treemap of Resale Apartment Transactions by Planning Region and Area", fill = "Average Transacted Price" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-32-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ### Self Trying： Adding boundary line ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ggplot( data = realis2018_selected, aes( area = `Total Units Sold`, fill = `Average Transacted Price ($)`, subgroup = `Planning Region`, subgroup2 = `Planning Area` ) ) + geom_treemap( layout = "scol", start = "topleft" ) + geom_treemap_subgroup2_border( colour = "gray70", size = 1 ) + geom_treemap_subgroup_border( colour = "gray20", size = 2 ) + scale_fill_gradient( low = "light blue", high = "blue" ) + labs( title = "Treemap of Resale Apartment Transactions by Planning Region and Area", fill = "Average Transacted Price" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-33-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ### Self Trying: Designing An Interactive Treemap ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} tm <- treemap( realis2018_selected, index = c("Planning Region", "Planning Area"), vSize = "Total Units Sold", vColor = "Average Transacted Price ($)", type = "value", palette = "Blues", title = "Interactive Treemap of Resale Apartment Transactions, 2018", title.legend = "Average Transacted Price (S$)" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](Hands-on_Ex0505_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-34-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## Then d3tree() is used to build an interactive treemap ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} d3tree(tm,rootname = "Singapore" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: :::
